decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that opponents will struggle to answer. By utilizing efficient cantrips and counterspells, the deck aims to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like Gush and Foil allow for card advantage and flexibility in resource management. Overall, the deck is designed to operate efficiently and aggressively in order to quickly close out games through the powerful synergy of Dreadnought and Stifle.

This deck focuses on using creatures like Birds of Paradise and Elves to ramp up mana quickly, while utilizing cards like Survival of the Fittest to search for key creatures. The Winter Orb and Opposition cards help control the board and slow down opponents, allowing the player to establish a strong board presence. With cards like Goblin Bombardment and Deranged Hermit, the deck has a combo finish with the ability to generate tokens and deal direct damage. Overall, the deck aims to control the game through resource management and strategic creature placement.

This deck focuses on quickly playing aggressive creatures like Wild Mongrel and Basking Rootwalla while utilizing cards like Careful Study and Survival of the Fittest to fill the graveyard for threshold and madness mechanics. By efficiently managing resources and using cards like Squee, Goblin Nabob and Roar of the Wurm, the deck can maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their strategy with cards like Gilded Drake and Daze. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, disruptive plays while maintaining card advantage and controlling the board.

The focus of this deck is to utilize the powerful combo of Replenish, Opalescence, and Parallax Wave to control the board and overwhelm the opponent. By filling the graveyard with enchantments using cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, followed by casting Replenish to bring them all back, the deck can quickly create a threatening board presence. Combined with disruption from cards like Seal of Cleansing and Mana Leak, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up its own game-winning combo.

The main concept of this deck is to create a strong combination of enchantments that synergize with each other to control the board and generate card advantage. The deck focuses on playing enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards, while utilizing cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the opponent's board state. With the help of cards like Serra's Sanctum and Wild Growth, the deck can quickly generate mana to cast powerful spells like Replenish. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful enchantment-based engine.

The main strategy of this deck is to control the game through counterspells and removal while utilizing cards like Standstill to slow down the opponent's momentum. The deck focuses on maintaining a stable board presence through powerful control cards like Swords to Plowshares and Wrath of God. It also includes land disruption elements like Dust Bowl and Mishra's Factory to keep the opponent at bay. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent in the late game with cards like Fact or Fiction and Decree of Justice while slowly chipping away at their resources.

This mono black aggro deck focuses on hand disruption and creature aggression to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By using cards like Cabal Therapy, Duress, and Hypnotic Specter to strip away the opponent's resources and disrupt their plan, while deploying efficient creatures like Nantuko Shade and Mishra's Factory to apply pressure. The deck also includes removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict to deal with threats, and finishers like Graveborn Muse and Cursed Scroll to close out games. Overall, the deck aims to control the game early and finish off the opponent before they have a chance to recover.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo by playing a big creature for very little mana and stifling its "comes into play" ability. This allows the player to get a powerful threat on the board early in the game, potentially overwhelming their opponent. The deck includes various cheap spells and card draw to help find the combo pieces quickly, while also including counterspells to protect the combo once it is established. The goal is to win the game by putting immense pressure on the opponent with a huge creature while controlling the game with counterspells and disruption.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought with a Stifle effect to counteract the drawback, allowing for a powerful creature to be put on the battlefield for a minimal cost. The deck also includes plenty of card draw and counterspells to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to outmaneuver the opponent and win through a swift and unexpected victory using a combination of resource management and timing.

The main focus of this RG Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using efficient and versatile creatures and burn spells. The deck is designed to apply consistent pressure and maintain board presence with creatures like Jackal Pup and Quirion Dryad while having access to powerful removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Treetop Village provide additional card advantage and creature resilience to ensure the deck can maintain its aggressive strategy throughout the game.

The central strategy of this deck is to disrupt opponent's game plan through targeted discard spells like Duress and removal spells such as Swords to Plowshares and Vindicate. The deck also utilizes land destruction with Dust Bowl to gain advantage over opponent's mana base. Additionally, the deck features powerful control finishers like Exalted Angel and Eternal Dragon to close out the game. Overall, the deck aims to control the board and outvalue opponent's threats with a mix of removal, discard, and powerful creatures.

The deck focuses on using enchantment-based combos to generate card advantage and control the board. By utilizing cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence, the deck can draw cards whenever enchantments enter the battlefield. Cards like Sterling Grove and Parallax Wave provide both protection and removal options. The goal is to create a board state where the player can overwhelm their opponent with a combination of powerful enchantments, while also having access to cards like Replenish to recover from potential setbacks.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent by utilizing Stasis along with other control cards like Counterspell and Chain of Vapor. By using cards like Gush and Impulse, it aims to quickly find key pieces of the combo while also disrupting the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes cards like Black Vise to pressure the opponent's hand size. Ultimately, the goal is to establish a controlling board state while setting up for a game-winning combo like Brain Freeze or Upheaval.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with elves and utilizing cards like Gaea's Cradle and Survival of the Fittest to fetch key creatures like Deranged Hermit. The deck also includes utility creatures like Wirewood Symbiote and Thornscape Battlemage for disruption and removal. With a few powerful finishers like Genesis and Masticore, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures while also having options for direct damage with cards like Anger and Goblin Sharpshooter.

The main focus of this deck is to apply pressure on the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures and disruption spells. By constantly attacking with creatures like Hypnotic Specter, Nantuko Shade, and Withered Wretch, while also using cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan, this deck aims to control the game and win through sheer aggression. Additionally, cards like Mishra's Factory and Cursed Scroll provide additional ways to deal damage and close out the game efficiently.

This Mono Black Aggro deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Knight of Stromgald, while disrupting their game plan with hand disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck also packs removal in the form of Smother and Diabolic Edict, as well as a bit of card draw with Graveborn Muse. Mishra's Factory provides additional creature threats, while Nantuko Shade offers a potential mana sink for late-game power. Overall, the deck focuses on early aggression and disruption to tempo out opponents.
